name: defectdojo
description: OctoBus package for DefectDojo API v2 products, engagements, findings, and scan imports.

DefectDojo.DefectDojo/GetFinding.name: get-finding
DefectDojo.DefectDojo/GetFinding.description: Get one DefectDojo finding by ID.

DefectDojo.DefectDojo/ImportScan.name: import-scan
DefectDojo.DefectDojo/ImportScan.description: Import a scan report into DefectDojo.

DefectDojo.DefectDojo/ReimportScan.name: reimport-scan
DefectDojo.DefectDojo/ReimportScan.description: Reimport a scan report into DefectDojo.
